name: Grade 1 Language Arts — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: Common Core State Standards for ELA
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Language Arts pathway.

units.title: Investigate: complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to complete sentences, narrative writing, and collaborative conversations.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
